title: Calabar、Cross River — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Calabar、Cross River的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Calabar是Cross River的一個城市，人口約520,000。A historic port city in southeastern Nigeria, known for its colonial architecture, annual carnival, and tourism.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
